## Description

What does this PR do? Big picture.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Proposal only (no code changes)

## Components Affected

- [ ] C++ plugin (`src/`)
- [ ] Legacy client (`client/`)
- [ ] Next client (`client-next/`)
- [ ] Protocol / message format
- [ ] Build system / CMake
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`ctest -V` for C++, `npm test` for client-next)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (if appropriate)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (if appropriate)
- [ ] Backwards compatible (new fields are optional, old clients still work)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — tradeoffs, open questions, follow-up work.
